nasb.text: If my step has turned from the way, Or my heart followed my eyes, Or if any spot has stuck to my hands,

esv.text: if my step has turned aside from the way and my heart has gone after my eyes, and if any spot has stuck to my hands,

cnv.text: 我的腳步若偏離正道， 我的心若隨從眼目而行， 我的手掌若黏有任何污點，

ccb.text: 倘若我的脚偏离正路， 贪图眼目之欲， 或手上粘着罪污，
